settings.name: Affan
settings.role: Oyama Productions - CEO | Sosai COO oversight

priorities.text: Align Mission Control features tightly to the original spec files and current realtime operating goals
Make the UI feel closer to Azure DevOps, Azure Cloud, and Teams influenced operations tooling
Keep task execution, agent collaboration, memory, and documents visible in one control surface

tasks.title: Convert Mission Control shell to left sidebar app layout
tasks.description: Replace the top-tab dominant shell with a left navigation layout closer to the screenshot references and Azure-inspired control surfaces.

tasks.title: Add org chart hierarchy view for agents and company roles
tasks.description: Show leadership, execution roles, and support/worker agents in a proper hierarchy view with role cards.

tasks.title: Improve office avatar scene and realtime activity visuals
tasks.description: Make the office view more expressive with richer avatar placement, current work labels, and better visual state cues.

tasks.title: Audit 0-Memory through 8-Layered-AI-Model-Stack and map missing features
tasks.description: Go file by file, identify what is implemented, what is partial, and what is still missing or intentionally deferred.

tasks.title: Make projects portfolio reflect actual progress and ownership
tasks.description: Repurpose Projects into a polished portfolio overview with progress bars, status, owner, and priority.

tasks.title: Add visual memory browser and saved docs viewer
tasks.description: Provide operator-friendly views for long-term memory, daily logs, and saved documents the user sends.

tasks.title: Initial realtime task board, logs, conversations, projects, memory, docs, and office views
tasks.description: First structural pass completed to move beyond the original template and toward a fuller mission control system.

tasks.title: Add approval gate section to Mission Control
tasks.description: Create a dedicated view for approval-required actions, pending decisions, and review checkpoints before risky/public actions.

tasks.title: Seed empty tabs with real working content and scaffolding
tasks.description: Populate sparse views so Mission Control feels like a living operating system instead of a shell with empty panes.

tasks.title: Add email setup and report delivery backlog
tasks.description: Track personal email delivery, future customer/lead email list operations, and report/document email workflows.

tasks.title: Plan portable cloud deployment for Mission Control and assistant state
tasks.description: Document and eventually implement a move from house machine to cloud machine with portable configs, memory, and project state.

tasks.title: Deep scan configured APIs and build secure API inventory tab
tasks.description: Audit configured API providers, keys, and project-linked integrations; then surface them in Mission Control with masked key display, reveal controls, vendor billing links, and cost-analysis support.

activity.title: Mobile API fix identified
activity.detail: Frontend API base was hardcoded to localhost, which breaks server calls from phone/LAN access. Switched to window.location.origin based routing.

activity.title: Tasks refreshed
activity.detail: Added the next major UI and alignment items into the Mission Control task board state.

activity.title: Spec audit created
activity.detail: Wrote SPEC-AUDIT.md to map each original source file to current implementation status.

agents.performanceNotes: Strong execution partner once campaign direction is clear.

decisions.question: Which growth loop should receive the next execution sprint?
decisions.summary: Prioritized YouTube-to-email acquisition over low-intent short-form reach.

decisions.question: How should content production be systemized for agent handoffs?
decisions.summary: Split ideation, scripting, editing QA, and distribution into four distinct responsibilities.
